name: Thimble On-Demand Business Insurance API
what_it_does: Thimble on-demand business insurance REST API for platforms and marketplaces to embed short-term liability insurance for freelancers, gig workers, and small businesses, enabling per-job, per-day, or per-month coverage with instant underwriting, real-time certificate of insurance (COI) generation, and API-driven policy lifecycle management. Enables AI agents to manage policy quote generation for on-demand insurance automation, handle instant binding for short-term liability coverage automation, access certificate of insurance generation for proof-of-coverage automation, retrieve policy cancellation for unused coverage refund automation, manage webhook notifications for policy event automation, handle marketplace partner embedding for platform insurance automation, access coverage verification for contractor credential automation, retrieve policy status for compliance tracking automation, manage multi-job scheduling for recurring gig coverage automation, and integrate Thimble with marketplace, staffing, and gig economy platforms for end-to-end on-demand business insurance automation.
use_cases: Embedding on-demand liability insurance for gig workers on marketplace platforms
Generating real-time certificates of insurance for contractor compliance agents
Automating per-job insurance binding for freelancer platform checkout agents
Managing short-term policy lifecycle from quote to cancellation for insurtech agents
not_for: Long-term enterprise commercial insurance (use Embroker or Markel for annual policies)
Health or workers comp insurance (Thimble is liability/professional lines only)
High-value specialty risk (aviation, marine, D&O) not in Thimble appetite
best_when: A marketplace, gig platform, or staffing app wanting AI agents to automate real-time on-demand liability insurance embedding for contractors and freelancers with instant COI generation and per-job flexibility through Thimble's API.
avoid_when: COVERAGE IS US-ONLY AND LICENSE-SPECIFIC: Thimble insurance is US-only and requires state-level licensing; automated coverage outside licensed states creates binding failure; automated national coverage assumption without state check creates unlicensed coverage error. INSTANT BIND HAS APPETITE LIMITS: Thimble instant underwriting has occupation and revenue limits; automated bind for out-of-appetite class creates decline not quote; automated universal acceptance assumption creates unbound policy for high-risk occupations. COI IS GENERATED NOT TRANSMITTED: Thimble COI PDF is generated and delivered via email/URL; automated COI as API response object assumption creates missing certificate in workflow; automated COI must retrieve URL not inline document. CANCELLATION REFUND IS PRO-RATED: Thimble policy cancellation refunds unused premium pro-rated; automated cancellation must account for partial refund timing; automated full-premium refund assumption creates reconciliation error.

auth.notes: Thimble uses API key for partner authentication. REST API with JSON. New York, NY HQ. Founded 2016 by Jay Bregman. Backed by Slow Ventures, IAC, Two Sigma ($22M+ raised). Products: On-demand liability, professional liability, commercial auto, drone insurance. SDKs: None public. Licensed in all 50 US states. AM Best-rated carriers (Markel, others). Gig economy and marketplace focus. Competes with Next Insurance and Embroker for SMB on-demand insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox available for partners; production requires partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-policy revenue share with partner; premiums from $5/day or $17/month for basic liability
pricing.notes: New York NY. Slow/IAC backed. Per-policy revenue share. Partnership agreement required for production API.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; quote and bind APIs throttled; webhooks for policy lifecycle events

known_agent_gotchas: OCCUPATION CLASS DETERMINES ELIGIBILITY: Thimble underwriting is occupation-class-driven; automated quote must pass valid occupation class code; automated free-text occupation without mapping creates invalid_class error or incorrect pricing

COI DELIVERY IS ASYNC VIA EMAIL OR URL: Thimble certificate of insurance is not returned inline in bind response; automated COI retrieval must poll policy endpoint or consume webhook; automated inline COI assumption in bind response creates missing certificate

STATE LICENSING MUST BE CHECKED: Thimble coverage availability varies by state and occupation; automated bind must verify state availability; automated 50-state coverage assumption creates bind failure in unlicensed states

POLICY START TIME IS NEAR-REAL-TIME: Thimble on-demand policies can start immediately or scheduled; automated coverage timing must specify start_date and start_time; automated immediate coverage assumption without time specification creates unexpected coverage window

WEBHOOK REQUIRED FOR POLICY STATUS: Thimble policy status changes (active, cancelled, expired) delivered via webhook; automated policy management must process webhooks; automated polling-only status check misses real-time policy events
agent_readiness.security_notes: On-demand insurance API. US state-licensed. API key auth. US only. Policy and personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: On-demand insurtech. US state DOI regulated. API key. US. Policy and PII data.
